arts.ttl: Man United, Real Madrid 'given major boost' in Alphonso Davies pursuit as agent's 'anger' is revealed
arts.sum: Manchester United and Real Madrid are allegedly given hope in their pursuit of Bayern Munich defender Alphonso Davies.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Heidenheim: Live stream, Game time thread, How to watch
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. A look at the rosters and injuries for Heidenheim and Bayern Munich .

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Real Madrid, Manchester United not giving up on Alphonso Davies; Bayern Munich extension not imminent
arts.sum: Transfer expert Fabrizio Romano probably does not want to rain on the parade for Bayern Munich fans, but things might not be as close as many were hoping between Alphonso Davies and the club. Anyway, Sky Sport journalist (via @iMiaSanMia ) did provide some good news — rumors of a strained relationship between Bayern Munich and the Davies camp were overblown:

arts.ttl: Hainer hints that Bayern Munich could be willing to stretch to their financial limit to renew Jamal Musiala’s contract
arts.sum: There has been endless talk about Bayern Munich ’s desire to renew star player Jamal Musiala’s contract. When asked about if the club would be able to announce Musiala’s contract extension during Bayern’s AGM on Sunday, Hainer had this to say: “That’s up to Max Eberl and Christoph Freund, who are doing a great job and leading the talks,” Hainer commented, via @iMiaSanMia .

arts.ttl: Club World Cup 2025 full schedule and fixtures for Chelsea and Man City
arts.sum: The expanded version of the competition takes place in the United States next summer with Chelsea and Man City representing the Premier League

arts.ttl: Villarreal interested in signing Bryan Zaragoza from Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Bryan Zaragoza, originally brought in from Granada to help address Bayern Munich ’s winger shortage at the start of the year, is back in Spain on loan at Osasuna. Villarreal are interested in signing Bryan Zaragoza on a permanent basis from Bayern next summer after his strong performances for Osasuna this season.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich predicted XI v Heidenheim: Vincent Kompany has big decisions to make
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany will be forced into at least two changes when his Bayern Munich side host Heidenheim at the Allianz Arena in the Bundesliga on Saturday afternoon. The Belgian has…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich CEO asks fans to give the Club World Cup a chance
arts.sum: However, Bayern Munich CEO Jan-Christian Dreesen is optimistic that the tournament will be a success: “I’m convinced that the Club World Cup can be a tournament that will delight fans all over the world. In fact, while the summer tournament will only be held once every four year, the original Club World Cup will still be held annually during the winter.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany, Christoph Freund eager for close look at Paul Wanner
arts.sum: As much as everyone is looking forward to seeing how Bayern Munich responds to a couple of less-than-stellar results, people might be more excited to see how Heidenheim’s Paul Wanner performs against his parent team. Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany thinks it is great opportunity for Wanner to prove his mettle.
